description.ko: 생물 발광 막과 액체 빛을 통해 호흡하는 유기적 생명의 미시적 탐구.
description.en: A microscopic exploration of organic life breathing through bioluminescent membranes and liquid light.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Respiratory Membrane.' A macro perspective of a massive, pulsating organic network where #7FB069 emerald moss-membranes form a complex breathing filter. Thick #2D5A3D dark forest-green vascular filaments act as structural anchors, exhaling swirling #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar that moves like viscous liquid mercury through a #E6F2E1 pearlescent fluid. Macro cinematography focuses on the microscopic rhythmic expansion of translucent cell walls and the glowing nutrient exchange. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, capturing the divine respiration of nature.
